title: Buttergemüse
description: The official client-side modpack for the Buttergemüse Minecraft Server. Enhances your gameplay with performance optimizations and essential features like minimap and shader support
body:
![background titel image buttergemüse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4326f8c5728892fe18def7a34d58c83ec78a45a6_0.webp)
# 🥕 Buttergemüse Modpack

**A lightweight and performance-focused modpack designed specifically for the Buttergemüse Minecraft Server – a friendly community project where members of our Discord server play and build together.**

---

## 🔧 What This Modpack Does

This modpack enhances the Minecraft in two key ways:

- **🚀 Better Performance:** Optimizations help reduce lag, improve frame rates, and ensure stable gameplay, even in large builds or busy areas.
- **🧭 Quality-of-Life Improvements:** Includes helpful additions such as a **minimap** for navigation and **shader support** for an upgraded visual experience – all without overloading your game.

---

## ✅ Why You Should Use It

- **Built for Buttergemüse:** Every mod in this pack was carefully selected and tested to work smoothly with the official Buttergemüse Minecraft Server setup.
- **Streamlined and Stable:** No unnecessary features – just practical tools that make your gameplay more enjoyable and your game more efficient.
- **Community-Driven:** Created by and for the players of the Buttergemüse Discord server, with a shared goal of improving the game while keeping things accessible and fun.

---

## 📌 Before You Download

- This modpack is **optional** and not required to join the Buttergemüse Minecraft Server. However, it is recommended for an enhanced and more stable gameplay experience.
- Ensure your system meets the standard Minecraft requirements. Additional performance may be beneficial if you plan to use shaders.
- The modpack is intended for **client-side installation** and does not modify server-side behavior.

---

## 💬 Contact

If you have questions, suggestions, or need help installing the modpack, feel free to reach out via Discord: **.jermayn**
